videos.title: SCALP MASSAGES THAT ACTUALLY WORK IN 2024! GET LONGER, THICKER HAIR FAST
videos.channel: William Gaunitz Trichologist - Hair Loss Expert
videos.description:
Losing Hair? Start Here

Get my FREE 8-part video series (link in bio) to learn what’s causing your shedding—and how to regrow your hair ASAP. ➡️  

SCALP MASSAGES THAT ACTUALLY WORK IN 2024! GET LONGER, THICKER HAIR FAST!

Welcome to our channel! Join William Gaunitz, a renowned trichologist, as he unveils essential scalp massage for hair growth techniques for achieving longer, more luscious locks in 2024. Perfect for anyone seeking amplified hair growth, this video offers a concise guide to stimulating scalp massages, vital for enhancing hair vitality. Learn how to boost blood circulation and nourish hair follicles, leading to healthier, envy-worthy hair. 
This step-by-step tutorial covers various scalp massage methods, from circular motions to acupressure, tailored for optimal hair growth and relaxation. 

📞 If you're facing hair or scalp issues, feel free to reach out to us for personalized advice and support. Click the first link below to contact us directly! 👇

transcript.original: so does scal massage do anything for hair growth and if it does what's the best scal massage for you to get the best results possible hi my name is William gonet I am the CEO and founder of evolution hair loss Institute I also a practicing trichologist for over 21 years and I'm a fellow with the world triology Society now I get this question from media Outlets I get it from clients I get this just basically through email exchange is there a scalp massage that actually works for hair regrowth now you see all these little tools out there these little articulating topical items that are rubber or plastic or metal and for the most part they don't do anything and the reason for it is that they're not really actually manipulating the surface of the scalp and they're not actually getting to the area that is growing the hair which is the dermal layer so when you're doing something on the epidermis you may be cleaning the surface of the scalp and that's fine but if you're going to technically massage the scalp you are going to physically need to move the scalp over skull and that is the scalp massage that actually works so a scalp over skull a scalp massage if you do this daily typically about 1 minute maybe 90 seconds prior to uh actually applying a topical formula to the scalp at night would be best practices you could also do it immediately before a shower because when you're shampooing your scalp you're then going to be cleaning up the surface of your scalp and doing an even better job at cleaning your scalp But ultimately by doing this between 60 seconds and 90 seconds every day you are going to get the best results out of your hair growth treatment and basically if you're trying to prevent hair loss this is a great hair loss prevention tool so what you need to do is take the palms of your hands you're going to push down on the surface of your scalp and you're going to move the scalp over skull now you can do this obviously starting at the back of the scalp or the sides and you're physically moving the tissue over the fascia of the scalp and actually moving the scalp over and by doing this for 60 to 90 seconds you are improving circulation you are getting the best results you possibly can out of that 60 to 90 seconds every single day and then if you apply a topical formula directly to the areas of loss and then massage that in you are maximizing the time and the efficiency of the scalp massage and you're going to get the best results possible just doing that alone I have seen people actually slow or stop their hair loss in some cases you're going to get really astronomical results because some people with inflammation really need that scalp massage if you've got questions on this or any hair loss topic go ahead put those down in the comments if you like content like this please go ahead subscribe to this Channel and I am happy to help in any way

Get my FREE 8-part video series (link in bio) to learn what’s causing your shedding—and how to regrow your hair ASAP. ➡️

✅ For the best result! Massage with ➡️ NutraM Hair Growth Serum

transcript.original: how to massage your head for proper hair regrowth and circulation so people oftentimes actually want to really scrub the surface of the scalp to actually massage their head but when you're truly actually trying to massage the head to stimulate hair regrowth which does actually work which I've seen in the clinics numerous times you should be using a scalp over skull method meaning you apply pressure and you actually move the entire scalp over your skull now if you do this approximately three to four times per week for about one minute you will actually see improved hair growth so please go ahead and do your scalp massage properly and use the scalp over skull method if you've got questions put them in the comments

videos.title: SIMPLE YET POWERFUL DAILY SCALP MASSAGING FOR HAIR HEALTH
videos.channel: William Gaunitz Trichologist - Hair Loss Expert
videos.description:
Losing Hair? Start Here

Get my FREE 8-part video series (link in bio) to learn what’s causing your shedding—and how to regrow your hair ASAP. ➡️  

SIMPLE YET POWERFUL DAILY SCALP MASSAGING FOR HAIR HEALTH

In this video, I highly recommend incorporating scalp massaging with the scalp over skull technique for ultimate scalp detox. By performing this daily routine, you can significantly improve the health of your hair.

 Scalp over skull scalp massage is a simple yet powerful technique that you can easily integrate into your morning routine before taking a shower. As you massage your scalp using this method, you will notice a detoxification process taking place. 

It helps eliminate build-up and unclogs the sebaceous glands, leading to improved blood flow in the scalp. Regular scalp massage with the scalp over skull technique also aids in reducing calcification and tightness, which are common scalp issues. 

By incorporating this practice into your daily routine, you will achieve the best possible results from your scalp massage. For a successful and effective scalp massage, allocate 3 to 5 minutes every day, ensuring you follow the scalp over skull method. This approach enhances the efficiency of the massage, allowing you to reap maximum benefits. 

📞 If you have any hair or scalp problems, don't hesitate to reach out to us for personalized advice and support. Click the first link below to contact us directly! 👇

transcript.original: highly recommend scalp massaging with scalp over skull I've got a lot of different videos on this and scalp over skull scalp massage you can do on a daily basis you can do it in the morning before you get in the shower and as you're massaging scalp over skull you are going to see a detoxification of the scalp if you've got things built up in your sebaceous glands you're going to see an improvement of blood flow you're going to see decreased calcification and tightness to the scalp and ultimately you are going to get the best results from that scalp massage possible if you do that on a daily basis three to five minutes every day and again scalp over skull method you can see my other videos for that

videos.title: The Science of Scalp Massage: Can it Really Help with Hair Loss? #dermatologist #haircare

transcript.original: massaging the scalp with oil will stop baldness no there is no evidence that massaging the scalp regularly with oil or without oil or just massaging the scalp vigorously is going to stop baldness massage just increases the nourishment of the scalp by increasing blood flow but it's not going to stimulate hair
